components.name: openclaw-core
components.riskReason: 3 minor version bumps (5.12 → 6.6). Stable release (not beta). Published 2 days ago.
components.recommendedAction: Schedule update during low-activity window. Review CHANGELOG for breaking changes. Test with lossless-claw and a2a-gateway before production.
components.changelogSince: ~1 month of updates. Likely includes bug fixes and new features. Check https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw for full notes.
components.gx10Impact: GX-10 Dev Pod Phase 1 should target latest stable (2026.6.6) for deployment to avoid technical debt.

components.name: lossless-claw
components.riskReason: MAJOR dependency migration: @mariozechner/pi-* packages moved to @earendil-works/pi-* (namespace change). Version jump: 0.9.1 → 0.12.0 (3 minor versions).
components.recommendedAction: REQUIRES MANUAL REVIEW. Do NOT auto-update. Spin up GX-10 team for impact analysis. Test in isolated environment. Verify memory recall functions post-update.
components.gx10Impact: Critical — lossless-claw is used for memory recall. Any regression affects all agent sessions.

components.name: a2a-gateway
components.riskReason: Current version matches latest. No updates available.
changelogHighlights: CLI developer experience improvements (peer aliases, ping/status tools)
Connection pooling for outbound A2A calls

components.name: openclaw-web-search
components.riskReason: Current version matches latest. No updates available.

components.name: mesh-memory
components.status: Active development. 1 uncommitted deletion (dream-cycle.mjs removed from repo).
components.recommendedAction: Review uncommitted changes. Commit or revert. Consider version bump if changes are significant.
components.gx10Impact: Phase 2 candidate for GX-10 deployment (multi-agent memory mesh).

components.name: gx10-dev-pod
components.riskReason: Not yet deployed. Spec consolidated, Ray + Liz feedback incorporated.
components.status: Ready for implementation. Spec: ITERATION-1-SPEC-CONSOLIDATED.md. Requires: SSH to GX-10 (192.168.1.100), llama-cpp-python CUDA setup, Qwen3-72B GGUF download.
components.recommendedAction: Assign implementation priority. Use latest openclaw stable (2026.6.6) as target platform.

components.name: agency-agents
components.riskReason: Static agent personalities. No versioning system in place. No upstream updates.
components.recommendedAction: Consider implementing version tracking for agency-agents. Evaluate need for agent updates based on new OpenClaw features.
notableAgents: agents-orchestrator — Pipeline manager for dev workflows
code-reviewer — Automated code review (overlap with GX-10 goals)

agents.task: SSH to GX-10, assess VRAM/storage, install llama-cpp-python CUDA, download Qwen3-72B
Audit webhook listener auth, validate GitHub signature verification, review queue isolation
Measure inference latency, VRAM usage, cost per review, establish baseline metrics
Test A2A protocol compatibility with updated lossless-claw (post-update scenario)

blockers: Requires Mr. Ross approval for resource allocation
Recommend updating openclaw-core to 2026.6.6 BEFORE GX-10 deployment

recommendations.action: Manual review required. Dependency namespace change is breaking. Test in isolation. Verify memory recall. Do NOT proceed without GX-10 team impact analysis.
Schedule update during low-activity window. Review full CHANGELOG. Update BEFORE GX-10 deployment.
Review and commit uncommitted deletion of dream-cycle.mjs. Consider if intentional.
Approve implementation. Target openclaw 2026.6.6. Assign GX-10 team.

executiveSummary: Two updates detected this week. HIGH risk: lossless-claw has breaking dependency migration requiring careful testing. MEDIUM risk: openclaw-core 2026.6.6 is 2 days old and should be adopted before GX-10 deployment. GX-10 Dev Pod Phase 1 is ready for implementation pending approval. A2A protocol (1.4.0) and web-search (0.2.2) are current. No action required for agency-agents (180 agents, static).
